subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! The effulgent rays of the Sun of Divine Unity have shone forth resplendent from the horizon of "He, verily, is God", and the Supreme Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله اشراقات انوار آفتاب توحید از افق انه هو الله ظاهر و باهر و قلم اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
